Petition For Relief Regarding Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Jun-21-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrew Weill, via ZOOM, for Bernard Hagan, Petitioner; Gabrielle Korte, via ZOOM, for Regina Hagan and Valerie Harlan, Petitioners; Alexandra Letzel, via ZOOM, for Paula Hagan-Bennett, Trustee.

The court confirms with counsel regarding the recent submission of an objection by the Trustee Ms. Bennett for filing, which is in the court's electronic filing queue awaiting review. The court and counsel briefly discuss this matter before the court advises counsel that it is inclined to take the petition off calendar. No objections are presented.

The First Amended Petition for Relief, etc., is taken off calendar by the court.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Neves. Not reported.
